title: 3 Days / 2 Nights Maasai Mara Safari
description: A short Maasai Mara safari staying at Olkinyei Camp with full board accommodation, unlimited game drives and park fees included.
highlights: Unlimited game drives in Maasai Mara

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Transfer to Maasai Mara and check in at Olkinyei Camp. Afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Full Day Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Enjoy unlimited game drives across the Maasai Mara.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning game drive followed by breakfast and return to Nairobi.

included: Transport in a safari equipped mini van
2 nights accommodation on full board basis

travelInfo.clothes: Light safari wear, hat, sunscreen, and a jacket for mornings.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals provided at camp.

note: Rates are per person and subject to availability.
